chunks.title: The Divine Command to Saul
chunks.reason: Samuel delivers the specific oracle from Yahweh regarding the war against Amalek.

chunks.title: Saul's Campaign and Partial Victory
chunks.reason: Narrative of Saul gathering troops, defeating Amalek, sparing Agag, and keeping the best livestock.

chunks.title: Samuel's Grief and Saul's Arrival
chunks.reason: Yahweh informs Samuel of Saul's failure, Samuel prays, and Saul sets up a monument at Carmel.

chunks.title: Confrontation over the Spoil
chunks.reason: Saul claims obedience while Samuel questions the noise of livestock and Saul blames the people.

chunks.title: The Rejection of Kingship
chunks.reason: Samuel declares obedience superior to sacrifice, pronounces judgment, and Saul pleads for honor.

chunks.title: Execution of Agag and Final Separation
chunks.reason: Samuel kills Agag, returns to Ramah, and the narrative concludes with their permanent separation.
